messages.text: I HEARD DEE HAD SOME INFO ON <NAME>!

messages.text: who's dee ? please give me his @

messages.speaker: A
messages.text:
I'm available for hookup at an affordable price
Interested?

messages.text: I charge 150 an hour you ok with that

messages.speaker: A
messages.text:
120$ for quickie an hour
A night is 250$ baby

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Fine 1 hour we take the difference in prices. You owe me 30 bucks if we hook up for an hour.

messages.text: i also saw a weird spider, look it up. it's called spined micrathena

messages.text: Ur kinda cute for a labubu

messages.text: Didn't know there was a new set.

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Also I don't see a new set on TfT?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Isn't the labubu the dolls hahaha

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: You were doing so well lol

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: C'mon it's kinda funny (: labubus are cute

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Maybe if I knew you haha

messages.speaker: A
messages.text:
Yes you're intuition is right.
What gave it away?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Nah like I said I'm a fellow somewhat Wasian from a Wasian family

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Got the Mexican in me too

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: And I got that doggy dawg in me🧍‍♂️..🐕

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: U Got me barking like *arf arf* 💀

messages.text: But the spelling of ur name might

messages.text: Tell me how Ldn compares to New York

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Are you a sucker for the accent as all the tales foretell

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: i'll tell you on our date x

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: In case it looked a bit weird

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: that Milly rock look like it started a category 4 hurricane

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: yes considerably the largest natural disaster ever recorded

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: can I be the largest natural disasters ever recorded in your life

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: u know who u look like

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: U know that actor from grown ups

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Can i take u on a date so i can tell my friends i went out w the spadester?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Well thanks <NAME> you've made me question my choices now 🤷‍♂️ x

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Well I thought my piercing really suited me, but now I've seen it on you and it looks so much better x

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Oo I don't know yours looks pretty good in my opinion x

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Well obviously the way to settle who's piercing suits best (it's you) is we need more evidence x

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Ok and how do we provide this evidence? X

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Well I think we clearly need to see more photos to make a better judgement x

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: And I think if it's still a stalemate, it can only be settled in person 🤷‍♂️ x

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: That is the cutest thing! Its giving main character energy for sure☺️🪷✨

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Well I'm in the market for a co-lead if you want to audition for the part💘

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: You'll just have to forgive me if I fumble it at some point, as I'm sure you know that is a part of the sitcom formula

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: That shouldn't be a problem, my writers are pretty good, but up until now the romance has been lacking a bit for my taste

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Well we must have the screenwriters fix this at once!

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: I couldn't agree more! We just need a proper meet-cute. Any ideas?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Hmmm perhaps a farmers market or a cute little coffee shop or bakery? If I understood the question correctly

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: I haven't been to a farmer's market in such a long time! That sounds absolutely lovely!

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Im glad.... <NAME> farmers market is open Fridays Saturdays and sundays... <NAME> Farms has a bakery deli/sandwhich shop, coffee, you can make your own peanut butter, fresh fruit, specialty drinks etc... Whatever catches your fancy

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: ok.. so u guys r just friends...?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: You caught me at the perfect time

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Oooo are you doing something spy worthy? 🤔

messages.text: legit as soon as I opened the app

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: what color shirt am I wearing

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: yea.... we gon have to burn you. Youre a witch huh???

messages.text: I wish I could send you a photo😭🤣

messages.text: Ya know... hahaha I've been told that a time or two.

messages.text: Stop please that was a very traumatic moment for me 😭

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Me neither, no judgement from me

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: You bagged Rita though, so you're winning

messages.text: I'd prefer to bag Ellie tbh

messages.text: i have a sneaking suspicion you know how to turn on the pyramids

messages.text: hahah ! so are wanting to take me on date

messages.text: yes. but only if you're cool with dinner being a live goat sacrifice under a full crimson moon. afterwards we can chant the coordinates to mars and see if anything responds
